textByHash.6885a243261870e6260990827c9c68686492edc3: Are you with the Black Guard or something?
textByHash.d6d8e297fb7f837cef8198f8138b47f36269af93: No, you wouldn't be, you're just a human.
textByHash.ecb99168e0977acf021fcccf7a8c8ab9db99555d: What do you want from me?
textByHash.bac55b13ea82092d55312a0c6f235b7f894089f3: Right, and nice they look too on my display tables.
textByHash.2da9b06818db9905d1a0da5201829073044e2dfc: They're mine and the last thing I'll do is part with them!
textByHash.f76b2d68d328af2495a6ad1ac7fe7fecbf56c6f3: Get out you pesky human! The boots are mine and you're not having them!
textByHash.1a450fa2b3408828f0508e2cc760c9b5f1926b41: Get out of here before I get one of my servants to throw you out!
textByHash.fba62f8a334221f306e3586c768fd3096ae86a06: Stay away from there! Who do you think you are, coming into my house like that?
textByHash.f8fb3387b0eebf78810da03851a2848a152a996d: What are you doing, casting spells in my house? Get out!
textByHash.f93bb24d50a5df3bebbf543f2d6636688dcec9f7: Hey! Is there someone at my window?
textByHash.8802feb48a6a9fddbf0105736ca8d31a15757082: Scram before I get the Black Guard to arrest you!
textByHash.6aa45e6f36768613205ff2e0cc20fa03aaa59e37: Someone stole my beautiful boots... I had to buy some crummy replicas, the real boots were one of a kind.
